title: DiracOperatorBundle
description: A serialized Dirac-type operator assembled from a bosonic background for Phase IV fermionic spectral computations.

bundleId.description: Unique identifier for this operator bundle

backgroundId.description: Background record ID from which this operator was assembled

spinorSpecId.description: Spinor representation spec ID used for assembly

branchManifestId.description: Branch manifest ID governing operator construction

operatorRows.description: Number of rows in the operator matrix

operatorCols.description: Number of columns in the operator matrix

assembledAt.description: Timestamp when the operator was assembled

replayTier.description: Replay tier of the source background

sparseNonzeroCount.description: Number of nonzero entries in the sparse operator representation

operatorStorageRef.description: Artifact path reference for the serialized operator on disk

massLikeTermIds.description: IDs of mass-like / correction blocks added per branch manifest

torsionCorrectionApplied.description: Whether a torsion-dependent M_branch correction block was included

cBranchCorrectionApplied.description: Whether a C_branch geometric coupling correction block was included

spinConnectionRef.description: SpinConnectionBundle ID used during assembly. The SpinConnectionBundle carries the full provenance chain: leviCivitaSourceId (geometry/mesh artifact) and gaugeCouplingSourceId (bosonic background). Two DiracOperatorBundles with the same leviCivitaSourceId but different gaugeCouplingSourceIds share the same LC part — their difference is the coupling proxy variation dD/domega.

passed.description: Whether the operator passed structural validation

hermiticityResidual.description: REQUIRED diagnostic: residual from hermiticity check ||D_h - D_h^dagger|| / ||D_h||. Physicist-mandated for Riemannian signature. Large values indicate discretization or assembly errors. Null only when operator size makes computation infeasible.

gamma5HermitianResidual.description: Residual from gamma5-hermiticity check ||gamma5 D gamma5 - D^dag|| / ||D||
